'''âdh-t-s''' ('''dhatasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whipsaw|whipsaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whipsaw|whipsaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-t-s
|-
! Lemma
| dhatasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhatasithi|dhatasithi]] || [[word:dhatasiji|dhatasiji]] || [[word:dhatasishi|dhatasishi]] || [[word:dhatasi|dhatasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatasuthuth|dhatasuthuth]] || [[word:dhatasujuj|dhatasujuj]] || [[word:dhatasushush|dhatasushush]] || [[word:dhatas|dhatas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatasuthu|dhatasuthu]] || [[word:dhatasuju|dhatasuju]] || [[word:dhatasushu|dhatasushu]] || [[word:dhatasu|dhatasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatasufuth|dhatasufuth]] || [[word:dhatasufuj|dhatasufuj]] || [[word:dhatasufush|dhatasufush]] || [[word:dhatasuf|dhatasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhatasethe|dhatasethe]] || [[word:dhataseje|dhataseje]] || [[word:dhataseshe|dhataseshe]] || [[word:dhatase|dhatase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatasothoth|dhatasothoth]] || [[word:dhatasojoj|dhatasojoj]] || [[word:dhatasoshosh|dhatasoshosh]] || [[word:dhatas|dhatas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatasotho|dhatasotho]] || [[word:dhatasojo|dhatasojo]] || [[word:dhatasosho|dhatasosho]] || [[word:dhataso|dhataso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatasofoth|dhatasofoth]] || [[word:dhatasofoj|dhatasofoj]] || [[word:dhatasofosh|dhatasofosh]] || [[word:dhatasof|dhatasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhatasĂŠthĂŠ|dhatasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhatasĂŠjĂŠ|dhatasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhatasĂŠshĂŠ|dhatasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhatasĂŠ|dhatasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatasathath|dhatasathath]] || [[word:dhatasajaj|dhatasajaj]] || [[word:dhatasashash|dhatasashash]] || [[word:dhatas|dhatas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatasatha|dhatasatha]] || [[word:dhatasaja|dhatasaja]] || [[word:dhatasasha|dhatasasha]] || [[word:dhatasa|dhatasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatasafath|dhatasafath]] || [[word:dhatasafaj|dhatasafaj]] || [[word:dhatasafash|dhatasafash]] || [[word:dhatasaf|dhatasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhatasasha|dhatasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhatasasha|godhatasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhatasasha|gokidhatasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhatasnĂŒsha|dhatasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhatasnknĂŒsha|godhatasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhatasnĂŒsha|gokidhatasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhatashĂ«sha|dhatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhatasnkshĂ«sha|godhatasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhatashĂ«sha|gokidhatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhatasrosha|dhatasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhatasnkrosha|godhatasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhatasrosha|gokidhatasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatasmusha|dhatasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatasnkmusha|godhatasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatasmusha|gokidhatasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhatasherasha|dhatasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhatasnksherasha|godhatasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhatasherasha|gokidhatasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhatasngasha|dhatasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhatasnkngasha|godhatasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhatasngasha|gokidhatasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhatasyasha|dhatasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhatasnkyasha|godhatasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhatasyasha|gokidhatasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhatasyamasha|dhatasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhatasnkyamasha|godhatasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhatasyamasha|gokidhatasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhatasnĂŒshĂ«sha|dhatasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhatasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godhatasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhatasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidhatasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhatasnĂŒrosha|dhatasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhatasnknĂŒrosha|godhatasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhatasnĂŒrosha|gokidhatasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatasnĂŒmusha|dhatasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatasnknĂŒmusha|godhatasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatasnĂŒmusha|gokidhatasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhatashĂ«nĂŒsha|dhatashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhatasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godhatasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhatashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidhatashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhatashĂ«rosha|dhatashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhatasnkshĂ«rosha|godhatasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhatashĂ«rosha|gokidhatashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatashĂ«musha|dhatashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatasnkshĂ«musha|godhatasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatashĂ«musha|gokidhatashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhatasronĂŒsha|dhatasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhatasnkronĂŒsha|godhatasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhatasronĂŒsha|gokidhatasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhatasroshĂ«sha|dhatasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhatasnkroshĂ«sha|godhatasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhatasroshĂ«sha|gokidhatasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhatasromusha|dhatasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhatasnkromusha|godhatasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhatasromusha|gokidhatasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhatasmunĂŒsha|dhatasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhatasnkmunĂŒsha|godhatasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhatasmunĂŒsha|gokidhatasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhatasmushĂ«sha|dhatasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhatasnkmushĂ«sha|godhatasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhatasmushĂ«sha|gokidhatasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhatasmurosha|dhatasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhatasnkmurosha|godhatasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhatasmurosha|gokidhatasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhatas|dhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhĂŠtĂŠs|dhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhatas|hodhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhĂŠtĂŠs|hodhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhatas|hohodhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhĂŠtĂŠs|hohodhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdhatas|nĂŒdhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdhĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŒdhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhatas|nĂŒnĂŒdhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒdhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdhatas|nĂŻdhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdhĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŻdhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhatas|nĂŻnĂŻdhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻdhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhatas|ludhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhĂŠtĂŠs|ludhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhatas|luludhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhĂŠtĂŠs|luludhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhatas|lidhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhĂŠtĂŠs|lidhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhatas|lilidhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhĂŠtĂŠs|lilidhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhatas|kodhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhĂŠtĂŠs|kodhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhatas|kokodhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhĂŠtĂŠs|kokodhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhatas|kedhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhĂŠtĂŠs|kedhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhatas|kekedhatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhĂŠtĂŠs|kekedhĂŠtĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
